I want my $249 back asap! I do not want this service and I have explained why! This is unlawful!

I want to assure you that I have already refunded the whole amount.  You will receive a confirmation email shortly, and depending on your bank, the amount should reflect in your account within 3–5 business days.

If you’re available today, could we have a quick call? We want to ensure we fully understand the situation and provide the best possible resolution — including adjusting the amount so you are not impacted further.
Thank you for the update — I completely understand your concern and I’m here to help you get this resolved as quickly as possible.
Please let us know a time that works best for you, and we will make sure to reach out accordingly.
